entries.title: Touken Ranbu Touneko Danshi Cafe 5th Edition
entries.title_ja: 刀剣乱舞 刀猫男士カフェ 第5弾
entries.description: Collaboration cafe featuring Touken Ranbu's Touneko Danshi in Akihabara. Offers exclusive menus and merchandise. Advance reservations required.

entries.title: Medalist × Hyakki Yako Ver. Pop-up Store
entries.title_ja: メダリスト × 百鬼夜行Ver. ストア
entries.description: Pop-up store for the TV anime 'Medalist' with a Hyakki Yako (Night Parade of One Hundred Demons) theme. Features exclusive merchandise with newly drawn illustrations.

entries.title: Fate/Grand Order Ritsuka Fujimaru Doesn't Get It BOUQUETver. POPUPSHOP
entries.title_ja: Fate/Grand Order 藤丸立香はわからない BOUQUETver. POPUPSHOP
entries.description: Pop-up shop for 'Fate/Grand Order Ritsuka Fujimaru Doesn't Get It'. Sells original goods featuring new bouquet-themed illustrations in Shibuya.

entries.title: Touhou Project × Maid Outfit Store
entries.title_ja: 東方Project × メイド服 ストア
entries.description: Touhou Project pop-up store with a maid outfit theme at Kotobukiya Akihabara. Features a wide variety of newly drawn merchandise.

entries.title: Kotobukiya PUNI☆MOFU Ginran
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ PUNI☆MOFU 銀ラン
entries.description: 1/1 scale plastic model kit of the cute fluffy character 'Ginran' by Kotobukiya. Features highly detailed sculpting aimed at collectors.

entries.title: Kotobukiya BULLET KNIGHTS Executioner HELL BLAZE
entries.title_ja: コトブキヤ BULLET KNIGHTS エクスキューショナー HELL BLAZE
entries.description: New addition to the 'BULLET KNIGHTS' action figure series. Features heavy proportions and allows for dynamic battle scene recreation.

entries.title: Megami Device BUSTER DOLL Knight Alice
entries.title_ja: メガミデバイス BUSTER DOLL ナイト Alice
entries.description: Kotobukiya's new Megami Device model featuring a collaboration with Honda AB12 Motocompo. Highly customizable plastic model.

entries.title: My Dress-Up Darling Desktop Cute Figure
entries.title_ja: その着せ替え人形は恋をする Desktop Cute フィギュア
entries.description: New prize figure featuring Sajuna Inui in her T-shirt version. Desktop size makes it easy and fun to display.

entries.title: BEASTARS FINAL SEASON Part 2 Premiere
entries.title_ja: BEASTARS FINAL SEASON 第2クール開始
entries.description: Part 2 of the final season of the popular anime 'BEASTARS' is now streaming on Netflix, featuring the series climax.

entries.title: Steel Ball Run Premiere
entries.title_ja: スティール・ボール・ラン 配信開始
entries.description: A new chapter of 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure', Steel Ball Run, starts its exclusive streaming release on Netflix.

entries.title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in the Real World, Too - Special
entries.title_ja: 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する スペシャル
entries.description: A new TV special broadcast for the popular isekai anime. Highlights the protagonist's cheat abilities.

entries.title: Bright Fes 2026
entries.title_ja: ブライトフェス 2026
entries.description: Official free TCG event held for one day in Akihabara. A must-attend gathering for trading card game fans.

entries.title: TV Anime 'Brave Punishment' POP UP CORNER
entries.title_ja: TVアニメ『勇者刑に処す』POP UP CORNER
entries.description: GraffArt merchandise sales event for the new anime at Kotobukiya Akihabara. Many store-exclusive items available.

entries.title: School-Live! Megunee Birthday POP UP
entries.title_ja: がっこうぐらし！ めぐねえ誕生日POP UP
entries.description: Birthday memorial pop-up for 'School-Live!'. Exclusive merchandise with new illustrations available at Gamers.

entries.title: HANA × Big Echo Collab
entries.title_ja: HANA × ビッグエコー コラボ
entries.description: Collaboration campaign between 'HANA' and karaoke chain Big Echo. Enjoy limited-time collab drinks and exclusive goods.

entries.title: Ensemble Stars!! 10th Anniversary Cafe
entries.title_ja: あんさんぶるスターズ!! 10周年コラボカフェ
entries.description: Ensemble Stars 10th anniversary collaboration cafe opening in Ikebukuro and other locations. Features a captivating limited menu.

entries.title: Gnosia Pop-up Store
entries.title_ja: グノーシア ポップアップストア
entries.description: Pop-up store for the sci-fi game 'Gnosia' featuring super-deformed character goods at GEO locations across the country.

entries.title: Assassination Classroom 10th Anniversary Cafe
entries.title_ja: 暗殺教室 10周年コラボカフェ
entries.description: Anime 10th anniversary memorial cafe expanding across 4 venues including Tokyo and Osaka, starting mid-March.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - To the Hashira Training Final Screenings
entries.title_ja: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」4月9日で終映、PVと新たな特典を公開　鬼と鬼殺隊の応援上映も
entries.description: Theatrical screenings for Demon Slayer will conclude on April 9 in most theaters. New final promotional videos and finale bonuses have been revealed, including special cheer screenings.

entries.title: Persona 3 Reload SEGA LABBIES Plushies
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ３ リロード」などのぬいぐるみが「SEGA LABBIES」より登場
entries.description: New plush toys for popular characters from 'Persona 3 Reload' are now available through the 'SEGA LABBIES' merchandise line.
